## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `test` — Adding/updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring (no functional change)
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance (deps, CI, formatting)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style (`black`, `ruff`, `mypy`)
- [ ] I have added tests that cover the new/changed behavior
- [ ] All existing tests still pass (`python -m pytest tests/ -v`)
- [ ] `mypy src/ --strict` passes with no new errors
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My commit messages follow Conventional Commits
